core_mechanism: constructing a parametric family of information/divergence functionals by replacing the ordinary logarithm with a deformed (one-parameter generalized) logarithm, then certifying their robustness via a uniform-continuity (stability-under-small-perturbations) criterion
brief_reason: The abstract defines its generalized entropy and relative-entropy functions through a deformed logarithmic function (with Tsallis statistics as one instance) and its central result establishes that functionals built this way vary continuously and satisfy Lesche's stability condition under perturbations.
